zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor de Bohun於1304年10月17日出生在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾可納雷斯波洛時，她的父親Humphrey VII de Bohun 4th Earl of Hereford28歲，母親Elizabeth of Rhuddlan22歲。她與James Butler 1st Earl of Ormond結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1363年10月7日在英國英格蘭倫敦阿爾蓋特享年58歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦維斯特明斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor de Bohun于1304年10月17日出生在英国英格兰諾斯 越可爾可納雷斯波洛时，她的父亲Humphrey VII de Bohun 4th Earl of Hereford28岁，母亲Elizabeth of Rhuddlan22岁。她与James Butler 1st Earl of Ormond结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1363年10月7日在英国英格兰倫敦阿爾蓋特享年58岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦維斯特明斯特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bohun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moon
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Moyon in La Manche. Compare   Mounce  .
Americanized form of German   Mohn   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor de Bohun was born on 17 October 1304, in Knaresborough, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Humphrey VII de Bohun 4th Earl of Hereford, was 28 and her mother, Elizabeth of Rhuddlan, was 22. She married James Butler 1st Earl of Ormond. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 7 October 1363, in Aldgate, London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58, and was buried in Westminster, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor de Bohun est née le 17 octobre 1304, à Knaresborough, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Humphrey VII de Bohun 4th Earl of Hereford, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth of Rhuddlan, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé James Butler 1st Earl of Ormond. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 7 octobre 1363, à Aldgate, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Westminster, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor de Bohun am 17. Oktober 1304 in Knaresborough, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Humphrey VII de Bohun 4th Earl of Hereford 28 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth of Rhuddlan 22. Sie hat James Butler 1st Earl of Ormond geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 7. Oktober 1363 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Aldgate, London, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Westminster, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Bohunが1304年10月17日にイギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアナレスボロウで生まれた時，父Humphrey VII de Bohun 4th Earl of Herefordは28歳，母Elizabeth of Rhuddlanは22歳であった。James Butler 1st Earl of Ormondと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1363年10月7日にイギリスイギリスロンドンアルドガトで58歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンウエストミンスターにて埋葬された。

ko.Westminster Abbey, London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 웨스트민스터 웨스트민스터 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Bohun(이)가 1304년 10월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 나레스버루에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Humphrey VII de Bohun 4th Earl of Hereford(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth of Rhuddlan(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 James Butler 1st Earl of Ormond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1363년 10월 7일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 알드가트에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 웨스트민스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor de Bohun nasceu em 17 de outubro de 1304, em Knaresborough, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Humphrey VII de Bohun 4th Earl of Hereford, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth of Rhuddlan, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com James Butler 1st Earl of Ormond. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 7 de outubro de 1363, em Aldgate, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 58 anos, e foi sepultada em Westminster, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Westminster Abbey, London, England: вестминстир эбби, вестминстир, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor de Bohun родилась 17 октября 1304 г. в местности наресбороую, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Humphrey VII de Bohun 4th Earl of Hereford было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth of Rhuddlan, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Butler 1st Earl of Ormond. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 7 октября 1363 г. в местности алджэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности вестминстир, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor de Bohun nació el 17 de octubre de 1304, en Knaresborough, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Humphrey VII de Bohun 4th Earl of Hereford, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Elizabeth of Rhuddlan, tenía 22 años. Se casó con James Butler 1st Earl of Ormond. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 7 de octubre de 1363, en Aldgate, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultada en Westminster, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
